org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation

Class AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation.AbstractAndroidCreationMode
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode.creation.AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PolygonDecorationCreationMode, PolylineDecorationCreationMode

    public abstract class AbstractPolypointDecorationCreationMode
extends AbstractAndroidCreationMode
    This class implements a Mode that permits to create decorations based on a collection of points.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel
